summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of /care pillar page. All major features working correctly. The product fetch fix (grouping by p.dimension instead of p.category) works correctly - 95 Grooming products and 262 Soul Care products load properly. Found 1 minor bug: Pet Sitting service card description has unrendered {petName} template variable on second occurrence (JavaScript String.replace only replaces first match).

ui_bugs.issue: Description uses {petName} twice: 'Someone comes to {petName}\'s home. A few hours or overnight — whichever {petName} needs.' The JavaScript .replace() call on line 1434 only replaces the first occurrence, leaving the second {petName} as a literal string.
ui_bugs.fix: Change svc.desc.replace('{petName}', pet.name) to svc.desc.replace(/\{petName\}/g, pet.name) or use split/join pattern

issues: Page shows React Suspense 'Loading...' spinner for ~8-10 seconds while lazy bundle loads (normal), but acceptable - NoPetState renders correctly after bundle loads

action_items: Fix Pet Sitting service card description: change svc.desc.replace('{petName}', pet.name) to svc.desc.replace(/\{petName\}/g, pet.name) at CareSoulPage.jsx line 1434
ALSO check lines 927-933 - Grooming, Boarding, Behaviour, Senior, Nutrition descs also use {petName} once each - those work fine with single .replace(). Only Pet Sitting has 2 occurrences.
critical_code_review_comments: Line 1434: svc.desc.replace('{petName}', pet.name) - JS String.replace() only replaces first occurrence. Use regex with /g flag for global replace.

setCurrentPet function in PillarContext (lines 197-206) is not wrapped in useCallback, causing unnecessary re-renders in CareSoulPage useEffect dependency array. Low impact but could cause extra API calls.

CareSoulPage 'loading' state is set to false as soon as contextPets !== undefined (which is always [] initially), before pets are actually fetched. This shows NoPetState briefly even for logged-in users until pets load. Acceptable race condition but noticeable on slow networks.
test_credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 (frontend user with 9 pets including Mojo, Lola)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Use SPA navigation after login: page.evaluate('window.history.pushState({}, \'\', \'/care\')') + dispatchEvent(new PopStateEvent('popstate')) to avoid losing auth context. Wait 6s after navigation. Admin login uses /api/admin/login with username=aditya/password=lola4304 (separate from frontend user login). The product grouping fix works correctly - confirmed 95 Grooming and 262 Soul Care products loading in DimExpanded.

features_verified.care_no_pet_state: PASS - Shows NoPetState with 'Care & Wellbeing for your pet' and 'Add your dog to begin' button when not logged in
features_verified.care_hero_logged_in: PASS - Shows 'Care & Wellbeing for Mojo' with soul score (95%), coat type (long, silky), allergy (Chicken), Mira quote
features_verified.care_category_strip: PASS - All 8 tabs visible: Grooming, Dental & Paw, Coat & Skin, Wellness, Senior Care, Supplements, Soul Care, Mira's Picks
features_verified.dimension_grid: PASS - All 8 dim cards render with correct badges (Long silky coat match, Daily care, Health priority, Soul Made, Mira Pick, etc.)
features_verified.grooming_dim_expanded: PASS - Opens with 95 products, sub-tabs: All, Other, Shampoo & Conditioner, Ear & Eye Care, At-Home Kits, Spa at Home, Brushes & Combs
features_verified.soul_care_dim_expanded: PASS - Opens with 262 products as expected
features_verified.product_detail_modal: PASS - Clicking a product opens ProductDetailModal with product details
features_verified.wellness_profile: PASS - Shows compact bar 'Mojo's Wellness Profile' with coat (long, silky) and allergy (Chicken) chips
features_verified.guided_care_paths: PASS - Shows 6 care paths for Mojo (Grooming Path, Dental Health Path, Senior Care Path, etc.) with Mira Pick badges
features_verified.care_concierge_services: PASS - Shows 8 service cards: Grooming, Vet Visits, Boarding & Daycare, Pet Sitting, Behaviour Support, Senior & Special Needs, Nutrition Consults, Emergency Help
features_verified.service_booking_modal: PASS - Grooming 'Book 5-step flow' opens ServiceBookingModal with 'Grooming for Mojo' title, Step 1 of 5, Mira intelligence context pre-filled
features_verified.product_fetch_fix: PASS - API returns 429 products, groups by p.dimension: Grooming=95, Soul Care Products=262, Supplements=32, Dental & Paw=12, Wellness Visits=11, Senior Care=11, Coat & Skin=6. All match DIM_ID_TO_CATEGORY mapping.

pet_sitting_template_bug.description: Pet Sitting service description shows literal {petName} for second occurrence
pet_sitting_template_bug.root_cause: JavaScript String.prototype.replace(string, replacement) only replaces first occurrence. The desc string 'Someone comes to {petName}\'s home. A few hours or overnight — whichever {petName} needs.' has two {petName} tokens but line 1434 uses simple string .replace() which only replaces first.
pet_sitting_template_bug.reproduction: Go to /care > Care Services tab > Pet Sitting card description
pet_sitting_template_bug.mitigation: Change line 1434 from svc.desc.replace('{petName}', pet.name) to svc.desc.replace(/\{petName\}/g, pet.name)
